text.message: red, im not competing for the port

if i was a betting man...
its defs you vs black tho, im an underdog and red is in bad shape
u are not doing bad i think oj

and even then that only evens it up a bit, doesnt give me win
robbing me is wild red, but ill give you a free pass coz you struggling

it aint, but your rob was also a bad read on the board, so math be mathing

what do u want from the catan gods
